summary: Small decomp-matching tweaks across fighter, game-mode, item, menu, and sysdolphin baselib files. The bot report recorded two newly matched functions and four improved unmatched items. The edits are mostly codegen-shaping changes: introducing temporaries, changing declaration/order/lifetime, adding void uses, and adjusting PAD_STACK.

key_files.role: Introduced scaled_abs_x10 temporaries in ftYs_SpecialS_UpdateLoop1Rotation expression paths, replacing inline abs_x10 * 0.7F divisions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report improvement for main/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS / ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_1_Anim

key_files.role: Added a void use of var_r31 after fn_80173098_CountUnlocked() in fn_80173098.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match for main/melee/gm/gm_16F1 / fn_80173098

key_files.role: Hoisted GameRules* gr declaration, assigned it later, and added a void use in gmMainLib_8015DBF4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report improvement for main/melee/gm/gmmain_lib / gmMainLib_8015DBF4

key_files.role: Changed PAD_STACK size from 4 to 8 in it_802A13EC.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report improvement for main/melee/it/items/itlinkboomerang / it_802A13EC

key_files.role: Reordered local HSD_JObj* declarations in mnName_8023A290.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report improvement for main/melee/mn/mnname / mnName_8023A290

key_files.role: Added a void use of type before a switch in SimplifyByMerge.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match for main/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag / SimplifyByMerge

what_changed: ftYs_SpecialS.c: duplicated else-branch expression was reshaped by assigning abs_x10 to scaled_abs_x10, multiplying by 0.7F, then dividing by that temporary.
gm_16F1.c: fn_80173098 gained `(void) var_r31;` after assigning fn_80173098_CountUnlocked().
gmmain_lib.c: GameRules* gr moved from a nested block declaration to an earlier local declaration, then assigned and void-used before reading gr->unk_x10.
itlinkboomerang.c: it_802A13EC changed PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(8).
mnname.c: mnName_8023A290 moved the sp18 HSD_JObj* declaration after sp14.
texpdag.c: SimplifyByMerge gained `(void) type;` after assigning type and before the switch.
smart_moves: The PR kept changes narrow and localized to single functions/hunks while targeting reported match improvements.
The bot report gives concrete match evidence: fn_80173098 and SimplifyByMerge reached 100.00%, while four other items improved.
The ftYoshi change used a named local temporary for the scaled divisor instead of opaque arithmetic reshaping.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small local lifetime and evaluation-order changes, such as introducing a temporary or changing declaration position, can affect MWCC output enough to improve matches.
Void uses of locals appear in this PR as a narrow matching tactic tied to reported match gains, not as a general style rule.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report two new matches and one gmMainLib improvement

decomp_lessons.lesson: PAD_STACK size changes may be used for stack-shape matching only when paired with explicit match evidence.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report it_802A13EC improved from 99.91% to 99.96%

naming_conventions.name: scaled_abs_x10
naming_conventions.context: Local temporary in ftYs_SpecialS_UpdateLoop1Rotation for abs_x10 scaled by 0.7F.
naming_conventions.lesson: When a temporary is introduced for matching, a descriptive local name that states the transformation can keep the code reviewable.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce a separate temporary and multiply assignment before use in a division expression.
Use `(void) local;` as a local lifetime/codegen nudge.
Adjust PAD_STACK size for stack layout.
Reorder local declarations to alter local allocation/stack shape.
examples: Moved HSD_JObj* sp18 after HSD_JObj* sp14 in mnName_8023A290.

review_feedback.author: dberweger2017
review_feedback.text: Author noted: "oops, didnt mean to commit that last regression".
review_feedback.interpretation: The slice does not identify which hunk was the accidental regression or whether it was removed before merge; do not infer a specific rejected change from this comment alone.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching `(void) var_r31`, `(void) gr`, or `(void) type` to see whether these lifetime nudges were retained or cleaned up.
Search for PAD_STACK changes in item files, especially itlinkboomerang.c, to collect evidence on when stack padding is accepted.
Search ftYoshi special move functions for similar scaled divisor temporaries or inline `* 0.7F` expression reshaping.
Search for PR comments around #2756 if curator needs to identify the accidental regression mentioned by the author.

notes: Diff and bot report are strong evidence for what changed and reported match impact.
There are no loaded review comments or reviews, so reviewer intent and acceptance rationale are not available.
The author comment mentions an accidental regression but does not identify a file or hunk in the loaded evidence.
The slice does not include full before/after source or objdiff details beyond the bot report, so tactics should be treated as PR-specific evidence-backed examples, not global style rules.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2756: narrow codegen-shaping edits improved several matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2756 used small local changes—temporaries, `(void)` uses, declaration reordering, and PAD_STACK size adjustment—to improve reported decomp matches across six files. Bot report: two new matches and four improved unmatched items.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR 2756 as an example under matching-tactics-need-evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2756 is a compact example where declaration order, explicit `(void)` local uses, PAD_STACK sizing, and a temporary for expression evaluation were used as narrow matching tactics and accompanied by bot-reported match improvements. It should not be promoted as general style; it is useful as an evidence-backed example for the existing matching-tactics-need-evidence standard.
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already require evidence for tactics; this PR could provide a concrete historical example for curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that `(void)` casts are generally preferred style; the PR only supports them as narrow matching tactics with bot evidence.
Do not infer which change was the accidental regression from the author comment; the loaded evidence does not identify it.
Do not promote PAD_STACK(8) for itlinkboomerang or similar functions as a path fact without later source/objdiff confirmation.
